programme.title: E2 - The Whistling Badge
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Music Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: E11 - Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: E20 - Thomas' Animal Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is asked to help at the animal park for the day and realizes that it also involves being decorated as a monkey.

programme.title: E13 - Farm
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: E24 - It's Time To Make A Family Tree
programme.desc: Great-Gran Gran shows JoJo an old family photo - it's fun spotting Gran Gran, Mummy and Great-Gran Gran when they were younger. JoJo recognises some people, but there are lots of members of her family that she's never met before.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E10 - Dot Pursuit
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E10 - Hoop
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch needs some help from the Playtimers to make hoopy owl bagels. It's time for a tasty adventure!

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: E3022-083
programme.desc: This programme transcends time to detail extraordinary historical events in Japan and the world - join NHK World-Japan on a journey that reveals the truth behind some of the turning points of history.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

Why Valencia Should Be Your Next Spanish Escape
programme.desc: Join us in Valencia, Spain! DW's Sarah Hucal takes you through her favorite city. She dives into historic plazas, vibrant street art, lively markets and the stunning City of Arts and Sciences. Discover why this might be Spain's most underrated big city - and taste local favorites from creamy horchata to iconic paella.

programme.title: Octopus Under Threat - Searching For Clues Around The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Microalgae: A Superpower In Carbon Capture And City Cleanup
programme.desc: It's slimy, green, and alive - and absorbs more CO2 than most trees. Are Kerala's new 'liquid trees' a gamechanger?

programme.title: Taking The Lead
programme.desc: Since 2015, women in every country in the world have officially had the right to vote. It's been a long road to this point. And although today many countries are led by women, they are still underrepresented in politics and public life.

programme.desc: Miss Mucous volunteers to help the Bean Scouts pass their fitness test, but secretly she's out to destroy Camp Kidney.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E13 -The Nothing Club

programme.title: E222 - Legends / Mall of Duty
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on 'Legends of the Hidden Temple' and can't wait to for a whole day of father/son bonding. // Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters so he decides to take them to the mall.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E202 - Summer of Secrets
programme.desc: Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe decides to go solo on missions. She meets a new superhero named Captain Perfect, and discovers they make a good crime-fighting team.

programme.title: E213 - iLook Alike
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: E207 - Jade Gets Crushed
programme.desc: Andre spends time with Jade working on a song and develops a crush on her. Tori tries to help him get over his crush, but nothing seems to work, and Andre has trouble keeping his feelings a secret.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E121 - Animal Hearts / Beast & Beaster
programme.desc: Best and Bester gate-crash the set of their favorite soap opera in order to find out what happens next. // Bester sets out to prove to a cynical Best that the new 'Beast of Bettervale' movie is based on a true story.

programme.title: E117 - The Drooling Fool / Patrick's Got An Alien Zoo Loose
programme.desc: Patrick's uncontrollable drooling gets out of hand and mouth. // A shape-shifting alien runs loose in the Star home.

programme.title: E417 - Diamonds Are For Heather
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man are called to the Swellview Museum of Stools and Jewels to protect the rare Neal Diamond from being stolen.

programme.title: E229 - Doodle Dimension / Moving Bubble Bass
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternate dimension where anything they draw comes to life. // SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move out of his mother's basement.

programme.title: E291 - The Goobfather
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds 'Patty Whips' to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E213 - The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: E535 - Game of Phones
programme.desc: When a young girl chains herself outside of Junk-N-Stuff, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to help find her beloved phone. While on a stakeout, they unexpectedly run across some familiar faces with a devious plan they weren't prepared for.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's “Tech Download” podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime Rpt
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: While tiger populations all around the world are crashing, tiger numbers in a remote nature reserve in Sumatra, Indonesia are increasing. Here even man killers are being rehabilitated and released into the wild. The man behind this unique conservation project is Indonesian tycoon, Tomy Winata. Tomy’s ambitious plan now includes releasing a tiger born in captivity into the wild, will it survive and can the experiment transform conservation practices and save the Sumatran tiger?

programme.title: E1 - Asteroids
programme.desc: Do we have a chance against a planet killer asteroid from space?

programme.title: E4 - Torres Strait
programme.desc: Zac and Darin test their cooking skills in Melbourne before heading to the Torres Strait Islands to understand the impact of rising sea levels.

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: E5 - Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.desc: Marv Wolfman and George Perez must pitch an idea for the new Teen Titans in 24 hourse, so they brainstorm different concepts for the team.

programme.title: E46 - Open Book/Shirt Club/Story for Steven
programme.desc: Steven and Connie want a new ending to a beloved book series, so Steven takes them into Rose's Room to re-enact it.

programme.title: E1 - A. Spike Gets Skooled/Cats Ruffled Furniture/Sleep Disorder/Tom's In-Tents Adventure/
programme.desc: Tom gets Spike sent to obedience school, and Jerry is left without a protector. When Spike returns, Tom tries hard to get Spike to revert to his old ways, but Jerry fights back.

programme.title: E445 - Bean's Bath Bother/Sample Sale
programme.desc: Mr Bean’s bath keeps getting interrupted, so he ends up having one in the garden!

programme.title: E109 - The Boring/The Teacher
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin use Molly’s time-halting power (because she’s so boring) to avoid an after school beatdown by Tina.

programme.title: E445 - Bean's Bath Bother/Sample Sale
programme.desc: Mr Bean’s bath keeps getting interrupted, so he ends up having one in the garden!

programme.title: E440 - Double Date Disaster/Table Tennis Trick
programme.desc: After a mix up, Mr Bean ends up taking Irma to a posh restaurant booked for the Paliwals.

programme.title: E60 - Charity Bean/Bean Encore/Mobile Home/Haunted House/Eau De Bean
programme.desc: Bean is both cajoled by Irma and spurred by his own jealousy of the fund-raising super-star Declan into raising money for the local donkey sanctuary.

programme.title: E9 - 演員集體重返校園
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E6 - 楊潤澤淘汰危機蘇有朋捏把汗
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 以美食出發，傳遞家鄉的味道，用最質樸的方式製作美食，給海外遊子送去家人的慰藉，傳遞濃濃的思鄉之情。

programme.title: Prison On Fire II
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat plays a veteran inmate Chung Tin Ching. When serving his term, Ching's mother passed away his son is sent to an orphanage. When his application for leave is turned down, he breaks out of prison, further antagonizing the new Head of Security, played by Tsui Kam Kong. Chen Sung Yung plays a fellow inmate from the Mainland, Lung who befriends Ching. When he is framed for murder, Ching is implicated in fingering him. Ching and Lung must break out of prison to stay alive...

programme.title: Why, Why, Tell Me Why
programme.desc: The first thing on notices about Yau is his strong hatred for mahjong. He had good reasons: his mahjong-playing mother refused to leave the gaming table to attend to his father who had been robbed. The father died as the result, of course. Being young and fancy-free, Yau goes to the beach with two friends to see if romance should drop on him. It does, and like a ton of bricks because he sees and falls for the beautiful Fong. It so happen Fong is a devoted mahjong player, but she has a sister who hates mahjong, Yau goes all out. He is first snubbed but later comforted by Fong in a gymnasium where he helps her dodge arresting traffic policemen. Fong tries her best to cover her addiction to mahjong and awkward situations come on fast and furious...

programme.title: Lavender
programme.desc: Athena is an aromatherapy tutor but can't heal up her wound at heart. One day, she finds a broken-wing angel falling on balcony. A scented romance is gradually in between them...

programme.title: City On Fire
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat plays Ko Chow, a police undercover agent who is torn between his duty as a police officer and his loyalty to his friends on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Superstars Comedy: 92' The Legendary La Rose Noire
programme.desc: As soon as Tony Leung, starts imitating the stilted dialogue of 60s heartthrob Lui Kei, film lovers know they've entered a circle of movie-in-jokes and self-conscious world.

programme.title: Kung Fu Vs Acrobatic
programme.desc: Two men fall journey into the far-reaches of China, but stumble upon a cave where Princess Wendy, her handmaid Mandy, and evil Tin have been in suspended animation for 800 years...

E9 - Nagaina: Queen of Kings
programme.desc: In the hot forest of Southern India, a female King Cobra is on a mission: to find a mate, find food, and lay eggs before the monsoon arrives.

programme.title: E3 - Safari CSI
programme.desc: Everyday in the Luangwa Valley a carcass is sighted. Each body holds the story that lead them to their death. In Safari CSI we investigate what killed three carcasses that have been uncovered...

programme.title: E5 - Rana: Queen of the Jungle
programme.desc: One of the most iconic animals on Earth stalks the jungles of India: the Bengal Tiger. Over the course of a single day, we follow the fortunes of one mother and her three young cubs. She must provide enough food for her family to stay alive.

programme.title: E6 - Youngsters of the Desert
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart; two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned, and a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: E9 - Nagaina: Queen of Kings
programme.desc: In the hot forest of Southern India, a female King Cobra is on a mission: to find a mate, find food, and lay eggs before the monsoon arrives.

programme.title: E1 - Mission Black Rhino
programme.desc: It’s a critical time for two black rhinos in Zambia. Four year old female Apson and fourteen year old bull Kango are at the core of a complex relocation mission that’s part of a grand plan to save a species.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: The Power of the Power of Two
programme.desc: In this episode mathemagician Eric learns about exponents and is amazed by how quickly growth occurs when powers are involved. Can he turn one gold coin into more than one billion coins in just one month? Is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: Guardians of the Environment
programme.desc: Philippe meets scientists, students and regular citizens who are acting as guardians of the environment. They are creating safe havens for New Zealand's endangered species, breeding clownfish in Australia, and introducing disadvantaged kids to the wonders of the oceans.

programme.title: Robberg - The Exploration Continues
programme.desc: The youngsters visit a blowhole and scale some difficult cliffs to understand how it works. They find new plants and animals and when night falls, they come across some interesting spiders, amphibians and reptiles.

programme.title: Trip to Mexico
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are invited to a costume party. Alim picks Princess for Milo, but Milo refuses, saying it's a girl's costume. Alim takes them to Mexico to meet Felina. At the muxhes' party, they learn about Zapotec culture, where muxhes are neither boys nor girls.

programme.title: Trip to China
programme.desc: Milo suspects Alim ate his biscuits, but Alim won't answer yes or no. To prove his point, he takes Zoe and Milo to China, where Mei shows them that Chinese doesn't have words for 'yes' or 'no.' They discover this while helping her find her lost panda.

programme.title: Solid as a Liquid
programme.desc: Eric learns that although all matter in the universe exists in three main states – solid, liquid and gas – it's also possible to create a liquid that acts like a solid. He does an experiment to create this substance, called Oobleck.

programme.title: Mapping and Levels
programme.desc: How come we see the Earth as flat when we know it's round? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of geography. Have hands-on fun by making a carpenter's level, and get to know Kim Jeong-ho, a cartographer who created the first detailed map of Korea.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: The Mystery of The Run-down Robot
programme.desc: When Gyro the robot appears to be unhappy, Addison has to figure out what's wrong with her little friend.

programme.title: Dubious Spray Cans
programme.desc: Tempus has noticed a big cloud of dangerous, polluting gases over North Africa. These gases affect the ozone layer. Fulmen and Nix are on a mission to prevent an environmental disaster.

programme.title: Fairy Tale Wedding
programme.desc: Doctor LeFrog teaches potions at Regal Academy, but Rose's mishaps lead to exploding potions. Vicky tricks Hawk into summoning a troll, who wants to woo princesses. Rose, Joy, Hawk, Astoria, and Travis team up to protect the academy's princesses from the gross troll.

programme.title: Robberg - The Exploration Continues
programme.desc: The youngsters visit a blowhole and scale some difficult cliffs to understand how it works. They find new plants and animals and when night falls, they come across some interesting spiders, amphibians and reptiles.

programme.title: Anysberg - Hidden Gem Of The Klein Karoo
programme.desc: The team visits Anysberg, an island mountain in the Karoo Desert. They find a cave with mysterious rock art that provides a glimpse into the past, and they discover how Nature can recover when given a chance.

programme.title: Grounded
programme.desc: Naomi is confined to her room without communication devices, and relies on Carol to run messages back and forth to Claybook so she can keep up with what's going on in her complex social life. But chaos hits when the boy she likes chooses that exact day to get in touch.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Green Science and Recycling
programme.desc: What's the difference between science and green science? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of renewable energy. Have hands-on fun by making your lettuce sustainable, and get to know Ryoji Noyori, a chemist and great advocate of green chemistry.

programme.title: Thaumatrope
programme.desc: How do you make 2 pictures blend into 1? We'll show you how with this optical illusion that'll put you in a spin!

programme.title: Trip to Mali
programme.desc: Milo is trying to learn his poem but is having a hard time remembering the words. Alim thinks it is easier to learn something while listening to music! Zoe and Milo do not seem convinced, and Alim decides that only a short break to Mali could change this.

programme.title: Lattice Have Fun
programme.desc: Are you a math genius? Or, do you know how to pretend you are? This episode introduces the centuries-old Gelosia method: a math trick that uses a lattice grid to multiply large numbers. How does it work, and will it help you look really smart?

programme.title: Actually, It's An Estimate
programme.desc: An approximation is the nearest estimate if we don't know the exact size of something. In this episode, we learn how accurate estimates come about by using clues and information about things in our everyday lives.

programme.title: Anysberg - Hidden Gem Of The Klein Karoo
programme.desc: The team visits Anysberg, an island mountain in the Karoo Desert. They find a cave with mysterious rock art that provides a glimpse into the past, and they discover how Nature can recover when given a chance.

programme.title: Thaumatrope
programme.desc: How do you make 2 pictures blend into 1? We'll show you how with this optical illusion that'll put you in a spin!

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E242 - 2
programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: E829 - Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends come to school early to have breakfast together. At the breakfast club, they learn about how food gives you energy and talk about their favourite breakfast foods.

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E218 - Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E12 - Chicken With Tarragon And Ratatouille
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Mauricette Jacquet, a hyperactive pensioner, former postman and fine cook. She's here to pass on her tips and experience with a simple, gourmet recipe: tarragon chicken served with ratatouille flavoured with ras el-hanout.

programme.title: E33 - Chevilly - Chamerolles
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chevilly castle reveals its elegant silhouette in the natural region of Beauce. Between the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, luxurious baths and captivating fragrances... At the Chamerolles castle, history blends with the scents of the 18th century.

programme.title: E4 - Mathieu Bassee At Studio Mtx/Chloe Valorso
programme.desc: Pissarro-Pontoise Art and History Museum displays the impressionist master's works. Mathieu Bassee and the team at Studio MTX are inspired by materials to embroider space. Miu Miu mixes genders and breaks codes. Sculptor and jewellery designer Chloe Valorso creates dreamlike objects inspired by animals, plants and minerals.

programme.title: E3 - Managing Risk
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas head to Sainte-Anne-des-Monts, where backcountry skiing must adapt to environmental challenges. They take care not to disturb the endangered Gaspesie woodland caribou.

programme.title: E1 - The Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum, Madrid, Classical Painting
programme.desc: A journey through time with the private collection accumulated by the Thyssen-Bornemisza family of German industrialists, specialists in steel manufacturing. In pride of place: the great classical French painters including Vouet, Watteau, Robert, Vernet, Gericault, Delacroix...

programme.title: E3 - The Perfect Culprit
programme.desc: Believing she is defending a wealthy client, Jeanne insists that Claire is also present for a murder trial... Nadia tries to assist a client who is a drug addict and now pregnant. But how far can you go in helping someone against their will?

programme.title: E9 - Cape Town (South Africa)
programme.desc: Inequality still exists in Cape Town. Sarahmee learns the pantsula with the girls of Gugulethu United We Stand, who have adopted this defiant dance. She experiences the daily lives of female fire crews and goes gardening with women fighting food poverty in the Intervisionary group.

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !:2025-2026
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !:2025-2026
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: E10 - Harriett's Reflections
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E28 - The Arrival (Part 2)
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: E28 - Stamp Collection
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: E5 - The First Challenge
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: E9 - Is Ai Eco-Friendly?
programme.desc: Theo, a teenager, questions artificial intelligence directly to try to understand it better. He wants to know what it is made of, what feeds it, and how it analyzes data.

programme.title: E13 - The Lorry Driver's Cab And The Clock Tower
programme.desc: Viola and Jan stop off at a rest area to try and see inside a lorry driver's cab. The episode ends in Bern near the Clock Tower at Daniel Alexander Glauser's home.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene:2025-2026
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Generation F S1
programme.desc: Fashion, gastronomy, sports, urban cultures, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the ''French touch''. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets the new generation of French-speaking creators and highlights an uninhibited, creative, bold Francophonie.

programme.title: E1 - How To Recognise Greenwashing
programme.desc: Do you ever have that impression that advertisers are being economical with the truth when it comes to the environment; with certain ecological claims more greenwashing than reality? Discover our guide on how to spot green untruths.

programme.title: E23 - Nona Source/Bateaux-Mouches/T3 Architecture/Fifties Fashion
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

As she fights for justice and her identity, she falls in love with Inno, a member of the same family. Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. programme.title: E1 - Unholy Man
programme.desc: After a beloved pastor's second wife is killed in a tragic car crash, it raises suspicions over the death of his first wife. Her death never sat easy with distinguished pathologist Dr. Wayne Ross.

programme.title: E5 - Deanna Cook
programme.desc: When mother of two, Deanna Cook, missed her daily call to her mom, her family began to worry Deanna's 'stalker' might be involved. After texting and calling Deanna, her family called 911.

programme.title: E2 - Parents Gone Bad
programme.desc: Stories of mothers and fathers who made headlines by committing crimes out of malice, extremism, and desperation.

programme.title: E5 - Justice For Mary
programme.desc: When Mary Scott is found murdered in her San Diego home in 1969, a case with few leads quickly loses steam. Years later, Mary's daughters grow determined to find answers about the mother they barely knew.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: When Michael, an older single man looking for companionship, falls for alluring psychic Janis, she sees him as an easy mark. But will Janis be exposed by Virginia, Michael's concerned relative?

programme.title: E5 - Marissa And Sean
programme.desc: Marissa and Sean need more space. With a growing toddler and Sean working from home, they are busting at the seams. They want a house with a great view and coastal charm.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: Fifteen years after a teenage girl places her baby up for adoption, she learns that her daughter has gone missing from the adoptive parent's home. In her search for answers, she uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: Fifteen years after a teenage girl places her baby up for adoption, she learns that her daughter has gone missing from the adoptive parent's home. In her search for answers, she uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: My Voice, My Life Revisited
programme.desc: In 2013, My Voice, My Life followed classes of students from three high schools for underprivileged kids and one school for the visually impaired as they embarked on a voyage of self-discovery through taking part in a musical production. Six years later, what kinds of lives are they leading now? My Voice, My Life Revisited goes in search of four of those students: Ah Bok, Coby, Sio Fan and Tsz Nok, charting their transformation and how they have grown over these past few years, as well as the challenges they are facing today.

programme.title: Midnight Swan
programme.desc: Nagisa is transgender. She grew up in Hiroshima as a man, but now lives in Shinjuku, Tokyo as a woman. Due to an incident, she begins to live with middle school student Ichika, who is a distant relative. Ichika has been neglected by her mother Saori. From living in solitude by herself, to now living with Ichika, Nagisa develops maternal instincts for the first time.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E261 -THE SHADOW'S EDGE
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: HAN Jung-woo, a pilot with top-class skills, is flying high and even appears on a famous TV show. But everything comes crashing down when a careless mistake causes him to lose everything, even his job. Blacklisted in the industry, no airline is willing to hire him. Desperate with no other choice, HAN Jung-woo transforms completely into his younger sister's identity and succeeds in landing a job as a pilot. But soon, he encounters more unexpected problems... Will his dream of cruising through life ever take off?
